name: llm-proxy-quota
title: LLM Proxy Quota
description: View quota and usage statistics for the LLM API Key Proxy
author: Mirrowel

commands.name: quota
commands.title: View Quota
commands.subtitle: LLM Proxy
commands.description: View quota and usage statistics for all providers

preferences.name: proxyUrl
preferences.title: Proxy URL
preferences.description: The base URL of your LLM proxy (e.g., http://localhost:8000)

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your proxy API key (PROXY_API_KEY). Leave empty if proxy is unsecured.
